subject: Cannot login to my account
description: I've been trying to login for the past hour but keep getting an error message. I've tried resetting my password but the reset email never arrives. This is urgent as I need to access my account immediately.

subject: Payment failed
description: My payment was declined even though I have sufficient funds. The transaction shows as pending on my bank statement but your system says it failed.

subject: App crashes on startup
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after launching. I've tried reinstalling but the issue persists. Device: iPhone 14 Pro iOS 17.

subject: Feature request: Dark mode
description: It would be great if you could add a dark mode option to the application. Many users prefer darker themes especially when using the app at night.

subject: Bug: Incorrect total calculation
description: The shopping cart shows incorrect totals. Steps to reproduce: 1) Add item A ($10) 2) Add item B ($20) 3) Total shows $25 instead of $30

subject: Two-factor authentication not working
description: I'm not receiving the 2FA codes via SMS. I've verified my phone number is correct. This is blocking me from accessing my account.

subject: Refund request for order #12345
description: I would like to request a refund for my recent order. The product arrived damaged and is not usable.

subject: Slow page loading times
description: Pages are taking over 10 seconds to load. This started happening about a week ago. My internet connection is fine as other sites load normally.

subject: Add export to Excel feature
description: Could you please add the ability to export reports to Excel format? Currently only PDF is supported which makes data analysis difficult.

subject: Security concern - suspicious activity
description: I noticed some suspicious login attempts on my account from unknown locations. Please investigate and secure my account immediately.

subject: Invoice discrepancy
description: My monthly invoice shows charges for services I didn't use. Please review and adjust the billing accordingly.

subject: App notification issues
description: Push notifications stopped working after the latest update. I've checked settings and notifications are enabled.

subject: Suggestion: Keyboard shortcuts
description: Adding keyboard shortcuts would greatly improve productivity for power users. Especially for common actions like save and search.

subject: Bug: Duplicate entries in report
description: Reports are showing duplicate entries. This happens consistently when filtering by date range.

subject: Password reset not working
description: The password reset link in the email doesn't work. It says the link has expired even though I clicked it immediately.

subject: Overcharged for subscription
description: I was charged twice for my monthly subscription. Please refund the duplicate charge.

subject: Server error when uploading files
description: I get a 500 error when trying to upload any file larger than 5MB. Smaller files work fine.

subject: Feature: Multi-language support
description: Please add support for Spanish language. Many of your users are Spanish speakers.

subject: Bug: Search returns wrong results
description: Search function returns results that don't match the search terms. Very frustrating when trying to find specific items.

subject: Account locked after failed attempts
description: My account got locked after entering wrong password. I need access urgently for a business deadline.

subject: Question about pricing tiers
description: Can you explain the difference between Pro and Enterprise plans? The comparison table on your website is confusing.

subject: App freezes during checkout
description: The app freezes completely when I try to complete checkout. Have to force close and start over.

subject: Request: API rate limit increase
description: We need higher API rate limits for our integration. Current limits are insufficient for our usage.

subject: Bug: Email notifications delayed
description: Email notifications are arriving 2-3 hours late. This affects time-sensitive alerts.

subject: MFA setup issues
description: Cannot complete MFA setup. The QR code doesn't scan and manual entry code is rejected.

subject: Billing address change
description: I need to update my billing address. The current one is outdated.

subject: Connection timeout errors
description: Getting frequent timeout errors when trying to load the dashboard. Works fine on mobile data but not WiFi.

subject: Suggestion: Bulk actions
description: Would love the ability to perform bulk actions on multiple items at once instead of one by one.

subject: Bug: Date picker malfunction
description: Date picker component doesn't work correctly. Selecting a date gives wrong date value.

subject: Forgot username
description: I forgot my username and can't find it in any of my emails. Please help me recover it.

subject: Tax calculation incorrect
description: The tax amount on my invoice seems wrong. It shows 15% but my state only has 7% sales tax.

subject: Video playback issues
description: Videos won't play in the app. Just shows a black screen with loading spinner that never completes.

subject: Feature: Calendar integration
description: Integration with Google Calendar would be very helpful for scheduling and reminders.

subject: Bug: Form validation bypass
description: Form allows submission even with invalid data. Required fields can be skipped.

subject: Session expires too quickly
description: My session expires after just 5 minutes of inactivity. This is too short and disrupts my workflow.

subject: Promo code not applying
description: The promo code SAVE20 doesn't work at checkout even though it should still be valid.

subject: Critical: Production system down
description: Our production environment is completely down. Nothing is working. This is affecting our entire business.

subject: Suggest: Mobile widget
description: A home screen widget showing key stats would be really useful for quick access.

subject: Bug: Image upload corrupted
description: Uploaded images appear corrupted or distorted when viewed. Original files are fine.

subject: Access permissions issue
description: I should have admin access but can only see regular user options. My manager confirmed my role.

subject: Duplicate charges investigation
description: I see three identical charges on my statement. Please investigate and refund the duplicates.

subject: Sync not working between devices
description: Changes made on desktop don't sync to mobile and vice versa. Data is inconsistent.

subject: Request: Offline mode
description: Please add offline mode so we can work without internet and sync later when connected.

subject: Bug: Charts not rendering
description: Analytics charts show blank. Only happening in Chrome latest version.

subject: Cannot change email address
description: The option to change my email address is grayed out. I need to update to my new work email.

subject: Annual billing discount
description: Is there a discount for paying annually instead of monthly? I didn't see this option.

subject: App battery drain
description: The app is draining battery very quickly. Phone gets hot when app is running.

subject: Feature: SSO support
description: Single sign-on with our company's identity provider would streamline login for our team.

subject: Bug: Filter combinations broken
description: Applying multiple filters at once returns incorrect results. Individual filters work fine.

subject: Need to update payment method
description: My credit card expired. How do I update my payment method to avoid service interruption?
